title: AGRICULTURAL KNOWLEDGE: LINKING FARMERS, ADVISORS AND RESEARCHERS TO BOOST INNOVATION
subtitle: Peer to Peer Mentoring for facilitators of innovation groups and Living Labs
description: A practice abstract describes the peer-to-peer mentoring methodology used by facilitators in AgriLink’s Living Labs to collaboratively address professional dilemmas. It outlines a structured five-step, 30-minute process that deepens problem understanding and generates actionable advice.
